easycontrol_serial.title: Bosch EasyControl — POINTT API setup (step 1/3)
easycontrol_serial.description: Enter the serial number of your EasyControl device (e.g. 101714742). You can find it on the device label or in the Bosch EasyControl app.

easycontrol_oauth.title: Bosch EasyControl — POINTT API setup (step 2/3)

easycontrol_claim.title: Bosch EasyControl — POINTT API setup (step 3/3)
easycontrol_claim.description: Your device needs to be registered with your Bosch account. Enter the credentials from your device label and the EasyControl app.

ivt_serial.title: Bosch IVT — POINTT API setup (step 1/3)
ivt_serial.description: Enter the serial number of your IVT device (e.g. 101714742). You can find it on the device label or in the Bosch/MyBuderus app.

ivt_oauth.title: Bosch IVT — POINTT API setup (step 2/3)

ivt_claim.title: Bosch IVT — POINTT API setup (step 3/3)
ivt_claim.description: Your device needs to be registered with your Bosch account. Enter the credentials from your device label and the Bosch/MyBuderus app.

buderus_serial.title: Bosch BUDERUS — POINTT API setup (step 1/3)
buderus_serial.description: Enter the serial number of your BUDERUS device (e.g. 101714742). You can find it on the device label or in the Bosch/MyBuderus app.

buderus_oauth.title: Bosch BUDERUS — POINTT API setup (step 2/3)

buderus_claim.title: Bosch BUDERUS — POINTT API setup (step 3/3)
buderus_claim.description: Your device needs to be registered with your Bosch account. Enter the credentials from your device label and the Bosch/MyBuderus app.

protocol.title: Bosch IVT Protocol. HTTP is local. XMPP is cloud!

error.invalid_redirect_url: Could not extract OAuth code from URL. Make sure you paste the full redirect URL.
error.cannot_connect: Token exchange failed. Please try again from step 1.

abort.faulty_credentials: Bad user credentials or wrong IP

data.optimistic_mode: Use optimistic mode for some functions (currently Easycontrol Operation mode set).
